metadata.title: SpyCloud - Add to Security Group
metadata.description: Automatically adds compromised users to tiered Azure AD security groups based on SpyCloud severity. Severity 25+ maps to High Risk, 20+ to Medium Risk, and all exposures to a Compromised Users group. These groups can be targeted by Conditional Access policies for graduated access restrictions.
prerequisites: Three Azure AD security groups must exist: CompromisedUsers, HighRisk, MediumRisk
Managed Identity requires Group.ReadWrite.All and User.Read.All permissions in Microsoft Graph
Conditional Access policies should target these security groups
postDeployment: Grant the Logic App managed identity Group.ReadWrite.All and User.Read.All permissions
Configure Conditional Access policies to target the security groups
Test with a known compromised test account

metadata.description: Azure AD security group ID for all compromised users
Azure AD security group ID for high-risk users (severity >= 25)
Azure AD security group ID for medium-risk users (severity >= 20)
